steps.title: Rearrange to standard quadratic form
steps.content: Move all terms to one side: $(k-24)x^2 - 16x + 8 = 0$. So $a = k-24$, $b = -16$, $c = 8$.

steps.title: Discriminant shortcut: b² - 4ac > 0 for two distinct real roots
Greatest integer k
steps.content: Since $k$ must be an integer with $k < 32$, the greatest value is $k = 31$. That matches choice 31 — 31 is correct.
